highlights.text: I wrote on Wednesday at 4pm that: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins below 6592.” We broke it down Thursday and sold to 6518 low of day yesterday .
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is ES can try to backtest 6575.
One of the most powerful building blocks is elevator down sell (building block 1) into Failed Breakdown (building block 2), into short squeeze.
Elevator down sell refers to a short period of time where ES flushes every support violently.
ES went elevator down to 6484 by 3am.
I wrote last Friday at 4pm: “This is where I get interested, and an obvious trade is the Failed Breakdown of today’s 6524 daily low.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow

post_title: 4/5 Red Days This Week For SPX. Will Bulls Turn The Tide Next Week? March 30 Plan
